name: Aramex PJSC
lede: Aramex runs two capability centers across two Indian cities. Pune and Ahmedabad, covering it and sales & marketing.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Aramex office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Aramex PJSC GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Aramex runs 2 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (Pune, Ahmedabad), covering it and sales & marketing. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

titles.title: Senior Manager Demand Portfolio, Planning & Performance

about.description: Aramex's India footprint covers Pune and Ahmedabad, spanning it and sales & marketing. The centers deliver IT for the group's global operations.
about.industry: End to End Freight Management, Transportation & Logistics

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all eleven decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Aramex operate in India?
faq.a: Aramex operates 2 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Aramex have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Aramex's India GCC footprint spans Pune and Ahmedabad.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Aramex run in India?
faq.a: Aramex runs it and sales & marketing centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Aramex's India GCCs?
faq.a: Aramex's India centers employ in the 201 to 500 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Aramex's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 11 leaders at Aramex's India centers, across IT, HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
